reviews.comment:
El minishop cierra en horarios nocturno cuando uno más busca en estos lugares para salir del paso. Muy malo

(Translated by Google)
The mini-shop closes at night, which is precisely when people are looking for quick fixes. Very bad.

reviews.comment:
No tiene full. Shop carísimo. Buena atención del playero.

(Translated by Google)
It's not fully stocked. The shop is very expensive. The gas station attendant was helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17509192282754172600/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMya1BxSGV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Local chiquito con poquísima variedad de productos y encima no trabajan con tarjetas, unicamente cash. Una YPF? Impensado, un fiasco.

(Translated by Google)
Tiny shop with a very limited selection of products, and on top of that, they don't accept cards, only cash. A YPF gas station? Unthinkable, a complete disaster.

reviews.comment:
Ordenados por ser la más céntrica y más usada. No espere casi nada. Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Ordered by being the most central and most used. Don't expect much. Good service.

reviews.comment:
Es "la" estación de servicio de La Paz. La atención es buena pero pueden ser muy lentos para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's "the" gas station in La Paz. The service is good, but they can be very slow at pumping fuel.
